positive: A stylized, bold graphic illustration of a cosmic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, nebula-streaked sunset sky. The mountains feature sharp, geometric peaks, giving them a strong, modern, almost crystalline appearance. The color palette should incorporate deep indigo blues, vibrant magentas, warm oranges, and streaks of cyan teal. The composition must be centered, with the mountain range filling the lower two-thirds, and the expansive nebula filling the upper third. Use a clean, flat graphic design aesthetic reminiscent of retro-futurism and Art Deco, maximizing clean lines and contrast. High contrast, perfect symmetry, optimized for apparel printing, vector art feel, cinematic lighting, minimal texture, no gradient messiness.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, cartoonish, realism, photographic, gradient messiness, low detail, messy lines
